<MethodEndpoint

  path={"/api/programAndPlanningUnit/programs"}

Retrieve a list of programs and planning units given a list of supply plan programs

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}}},"description":"The list of program IDs to retrieve programs and planning units for","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"idString":{"type":"string"},"label":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":"circular(BaseModel_DropDownView)"},"title":"BaseModel_DropDownView"},"labelId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"label_en":{"type":"string"},"label_fr":{"type":"string"},"label_pr":{"type":"string"},"label_sp":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Label_DropDownView"},"typeId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"SimpleObjectWithType_DropDownView"}}}},"description":"Returns a list of programs and planning units for a list of programs"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_DropDownView"}}},"description":"User does not have rights to access these programs"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_DropDownView"}}},"description":"Internal error while getting program and planning unit list"}}}
>
